steps.title: Simplify the absolute value function
steps.content: First, simplify the expression inside the absolute value: $x - 5x = -4x$. Therefore, $f(x) = |-4x| = 4|x|.

steps.title: Evaluate f(6) and set up the equation
steps.content:
Calculate $f(6) = 4|6| = 24$.

Using the given condition $f(6) - f(a) = -24$:
$$24 - f(a) = -24$$
$$f(a) = 48$$

steps.title: Solve for a
steps.content:
Since $f(a) = 4|a|$, we have:
$$4|a| = 48$$
$$|a| = 12$$
This gives $a = 12$ or $a = -12$. Among the answer choices, only $a = 12$ appears. That matches Choice C — $12$.
